errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this.
errors.not_found_description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
errors.server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.failed_to_load_classes: Failed to load classes. Please try again.
errors.tenant_subdomain_unresolved: Could not determine your school. Set VITE_DEV_TENANT_SUBDOMAIN or use your school's subdomain URL.
errors.invalid_callback: Invalid authentication callback. Please try logging in again.
errors.session_exchange_failed: Failed to establish your session. Please try logging in again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.user_not_found: User account not found. Please contact support.
errors.contact_support: If this problem persists, please contact support.
errors.dashboard_load_failed: Failed to load dashboard. Please try refreshing the page.
errors.image_too_large: Image must be 2 MB or smaller.
errors.image_invalid_type: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
errors.image_dimensions: Image dimensions are too large to process.
errors.image_upload_failed: Class saved, but image upload failed. Edit the class to try again.
errors.email_delivery_failed: We couldn't send the login email. Try again in a few minutes and check your spam folder. If this keeps happening, contact support.
errors.rate_limited: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.expired_link: This login link has expired. Request a new magic link from the login page.
errors.redirect_mismatch: Login redirect is not configured for this site. Please contact support.

validation.date_past: Date must be in the past.
validation.date_future: Date must be in the future.
validation.date_range: End date must be after start date.

class.name: Class Name
class.location_placeholder: e.g. Studio B, 12 Rothschild Blvd, Tel Aviv
class.cover_image_hint: JPEG, PNG or WebP. Max 2 MB.
class.price_help: Enter the price in major currency units (e.g. 150.00).
class.price_incl_vat_help: Amount families pay — VAT is included in this figure.
class.price_excl_vat_help: Net price — VAT is added at checkout.

setup.title: System Setup
setup.description: Manage levels, terms, billing accounts, and classes

requirements.description: Build a library of reusable requirements that can be linked to individual classes.
requirements.empty_message: Add requirement templates here, then link them to specific classes from the Manage Classes page.
requirements.display_text_help: Shown to parents during enrolment, e.g. "Ages 7 and up"

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Enter your login details
login.code_sent: Check your email for a sign-in code.
login.code_helper: Works on any device — paste the numeric code from your email.
login.invalid_code: That code is incorrect or has expired. Request a new code.
login.check_email: Check your email for a sign-in link.

people.title: Students & Adults
people.description: Manage existing students and adults. To enrol a new student, use the Enrol button.
people.emergency_contact_required: Emergency contact information is always required.
people.consent_note: Explicit consent is required to store or use photos.
people.waiver_accept_label: I have read and accept the release of liability
people.waiver_required: You must accept the waiver to continue.
people.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
people.empty_message: Enrol your first student to start managing enrolments and family links.
people.delete_note: To request data removal, please contact support. Hard deletion is not permitted under data retention policy.

families.title: Families
families.description: Family records are created automatically when a student enrols. Contact details can be edited here.
families.empty_message: Families are created automatically when a student enrols through the enrolment flow.
families.detail_subtitle: Family contact details and linked members
families.no_students: No students linked to this family.
families.data_retention_note: Family records cannot be deleted. To request data removal, please contact support (GDPR Right to Erasure — anonymisation RPC).
families.search_placeholder: Search by family name, contact, or email

students.title: Students
students.description: View and manage all students. Use class buttons to filter, expand a row for a quick summary, or click Details for full info.
students.empty_message: Enrol a student to get started, or adjust your filters.
students.no_billing: No billing account linked to any enrolment
students.payment_history_placeholder: Payment transaction history will appear here once Stripe webhooks are set up.
students.cancel_enrolment_confirm: Cancel {{studentName}}'s enrolment in {{className}}? This releases the class slot before payment.
students.cancel_enrolment_reason_placeholder: e.g. Wrong class selected, duplicate enrolment
students.cancel_enrolment_error_has_payment: This enrolment cannot be cancelled because payment has already been recorded.
students.cancel_enrolment_error_invalid_status: This enrolment cannot be cancelled in its current state.

admin_enrol.title: Enrol {{name}}
admin_enrol.class_desc: Select a class for this student.
admin_enrol.pay_now_desc: Enter card details now — for when the parent is here in person.
admin_enrol.pay_now_inline: Enter card details below to complete enrolment.
admin_enrol.send_link_desc: Create the enrolment and email a link for the guardian to sign the waiver (if required) and pay.
admin_enrol.email_required: An email address is required to send a completion link.
admin_enrol.link_sent: Completion link sent to {{email}}. The enrolment is pending until waiver and payment are completed.
admin_enrol.offline_desc: Mark as paid when cash, check, or bank transfer was received in person.
admin_enrol.offline_recorded: Enrolment recorded as active with offline payment.
admin_enrol.payment_success: Payment received — enrolment is now active.
admin_enrol.waiver_link_desc: Email a secure link so the guardian can sign the waiver. The link is for the guardian, not the admin account.
admin_enrol.waiver_link_not_emailed: Waiver link was created but email delivery failed for {{email}}. Copy the link below and send it manually.
admin_enrol.override_reason: Reason for using a different email
admin_enrol.link_copy_failed: Could not copy automatically. Select and copy the link manually.

enrol_pay.title: Complete payment
enrol_pay.not_payable: This enrolment cannot be paid online.
enrol_pay.already_paid_desc: This enrolment has already been paid. Thank you!
enrol_pay.secure_link_required: This page requires a secure completion link. Open the full link from the email, or sign in to continue.
enrol_pay.admin_session_block: This completion link is for the guardian. Sign out of the admin account or open the link in a private window.

billing.title: Billing Accounts
billing.description: Manage payment accounts and link students.
billing.search_placeholder: Search by account holder or email
billing.empty_message: Create a billing account to link students and track payments.
billing.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this account?

requirements.hard_block_help: If checked, students who don't meet this requirement cannot enroll.

classes.title: Classes
classes.no_classes_message: There are currently no upcoming {{entity}}. Please check back soon or contact us for more information.

enrolment.select_student_desc: Choose a student from your family, enrol yourself, or add a new child.
enrolment.new_child_desc: Enter the new student's details. Your contact information is already on file.
enrolment.no_account_linked: Your login is not linked to a family account. Please contact the studio.
enrolment.ineligible_age: Not eligible for the selected class age range
enrolment.already_enrolled_preselected: This student is already enrolled in the selected class for this term. View their enrolments in the portal or choose a different class.
enrolment.already_enrolled_preselected_admin: This student is already enrolled in the selected class for this term. Choose a different class to continue.
enrolment.selected_class_age_mismatch: This student will be age {{age}} at the start of the season. The selected class is for ages {{classAges}}.
enrolment.selected_class_age_mismatch_adult: This student will be an adult at the start of the season. The selected class is for ages {{classAges}}.
enrolment.selected_class_age_ineligible_hint: Please go back and choose a different class, or contact the studio for help.
enrolment.age_review_note_label: Tell us why this student should be considered
enrolment.age_review_note_placeholder: Please explain why you are requesting a review (minimum 10 characters).
enrolment.age_review_submitted_body: The studio will review your request and email you when a decision is made. Payment is not required until approval.
enrolment.age_review_error_note_too_short: Please enter at least 10 characters explaining your request.
enrolment.age_review_error_eligible: This student meets the class age requirements.
enrolment.age_review_error_forbidden: You are not allowed to submit this review request.
enrolment.age_review_error_generic: Could not submit the review request. Please try again or contact the studio.
enrolment.admin_select_desc: Search for an existing student or family, or add a new child.
enrolment.admin_search_placeholder: Name, parent, email, phone, age, class…
enrolment.admin_parent_row_hint: Parent / guardian — select to choose a child
enrolment.admin_parent_pick_child: Select to choose a child to enrol
enrolment.admin_pick_child_desc: Choose a child to enrol for {{name}}.
enrolment.admin_no_children: No children found on this family account.
enrolment.admin_existing_family_hint: {{name}} is already registered. The new student will be added to their family account.
enrolment.admin_add_child_desc: Enter the new student's details. They will be added to the linked family account.
enrolment.admin_new_family_hint: No existing family for this email — enter guardian details below.
enrolment.add_child_to_family: Add new child to a family
enrolment.add_new_child_to_family: Add new child to this family
enrolment.new_minor_desc: A new family record will be created with the guardian as the primary contact.
enrolment.new_adult_desc: An adult solo record will be created. No family is required.
enrolment.class_desc: Select the class you would like to enrol in.
enrolment.age_filter_inactive: Age filtering is not active — no classes have min/max age set. Edit each class under Manage Classes and set Minimum age / Maximum age (not the Requirements panel). Apply the latest database migration if those fields are missing.
enrolment.classes_filtered_by_age: {{count}} class(es) hidden — not in this student's age range.
enrolment.no_classes_for_age: No classes match this student's age.
enrolment.no_classes_for_age_hint: This student is age {{age}}. Check that the class min/max age range includes {{age}} (e.g. min 3 and max 5, not max 3 only). Set ages on the class form under Manage Classes.
enrolment.no_classes_for_age_hint_adult: This student is an adult (18+). Check that the class minimum age is 18 or lower and the maximum age (if set) allows adults. Set ages on the class form under Manage Classes.
enrolment.no_classes: No classes are currently available for enrolment.
enrolment.notification_desc: Set up how you want to receive updates
enrolment.notification_skip_hint: You can change notification preferences later in the portal. This step is optional.
enrolment.notification_email_desc: Receive enrolment confirmations and updates by email.
enrolment.confirmation_desc: Your enrolment has been confirmed. Confirmation email sent.
enrolment.confirmation_portal_hint: We will email {{email}} with a link to access your family portal.
enrolment.confirmation_desc_pending_waiver: Your payment has been processed, but your enrolment is NOT yet active.
enrolment.pending_waiver_email_hint: A link to sign your waiver has been sent to {{email}}. Click the link to complete your enrolment.
enrolment.pending_waiver_legal_notice: Your spot is reserved but you may NOT attend class until the waiver is signed. Classes missed while your waiver is pending are not eligible for refund, credit, or makeup. If the waiver is not signed within 7 days your enrolment will be automatically cancelled and a full refund issued.
enrolment.guest_waiver_intro: Before completing your payment, please read and acknowledge the following:
enrolment.guest_waiver_point_inactive: Your enrolment will NOT be active until the waiver is signed.
enrolment.guest_waiver_point_no_attend: You may not attend class until the waiver is signed, regardless of payment.
enrolment.guest_waiver_point_no_refund: Classes missed while your waiver is pending are NOT eligible for refund, credit, or makeup.
enrolment.guest_waiver_point_auto_cancel: If the waiver is not signed within 7 days, your enrolment will be automatically cancelled and a full refund issued.
enrolment.guest_waiver_how_it_works_body: After payment, a link to sign the waiver will be emailed to {{email}}. It only takes a minute.
enrolment.guest_waiver_ack_text: I understand my enrolment is NOT active until I sign the waiver, and that I may not attend class or receive a refund for missed classes during this period.
enrolment.guest_sign_in_prompt: Already registered? Sign in to select your children instead of entering details again.
enrolment.existing_email_prompt: We found an account with this email. Sign in to select your children and continue enrolment.
enrolment.guest_new_family_desc: Enter guardian and student details to enrol. No account needed yet — you will receive portal access by email after payment.
enrolment.guest_adult_desc: Enter your details to enrol. No account needed yet — you will receive portal access by email after payment.
enrolment.guardian_email_required: Guardian email is required for confirmation and portal access.

levels_terms.title: Levels & Terms
levels_terms.terms_description: Create and manage learning terms (seasons, semesters)
levels_terms.mark_active_confirm: This will change the previous active term to 'Completed'.
levels_terms.only_one_active: Only one term can be active at a time.

levels.title: Class Levels
levels.empty_message: Add levels to organise classes by skill or grade.

terms.title: Learning Terms
terms.description: Create and manage {{entity}} and other scheduling periods.
terms.empty_message: Add a term before scheduling classes and enrolments.

admin_classes.description: Create, edit, and delete {{entity}} for your studio.
admin_classes.empty_message: Add your first {{entity}} to make it available for enrolment.
admin_classes.requirements_empty: No requirements — all students can enrol.

pages.coming_soon_portal: Your portal dashboard is coming soon. You will be able to view enrolments, attendance, and payments here.

portal.subtitle: View your children's classes and payment history.
portal.no_children: No students linked to your account yet.
portal.no_enrolments_for_filter: No enrolments match the selected status filters.
portal.add_child_desc: Enter your child's details. Your contact information is already on file.
portal.enrolment_success_desc: Your payment was received. The new class appears below for your child.

waivers.title: Waivers
waivers.description: Manage consent templates and view signed waiver evidence.
waivers.activate_confirm: Setting this template as active will require all students to re-sign before their next enrolment. Continue?
waivers.no_templates: No consent templates yet. Create one to get started.
waivers.no_evidence_filtered: No waivers match the current filters.
waivers.v1_limit_note: All active classes share this waiver template. Per-class template assignment is available in V2.

enrol_complete.missing_id: No enrolment ID was provided. Please check your email link.
enrol_complete.engagement_not_found: We could not find your enrolment. Please check the link in your email or contact us.
enrol_complete.no_active_template: No active waiver template found. Please contact us.
enrol_complete.link_expired_body: Magic links expire after 1 hour. Enter your email address to receive a fresh link.
enrol_complete.resend_sent_body: A new link has been sent to your email. It expires in 1 hour.
enrol_complete.already_signed_body: Your waiver has been signed and your enrolment is now active.
enrol_complete.cancelled_body: This enrolment was cancelled because the waiver was not signed in time. A refund has been issued. Please re-enrol if you would like to rejoin.
enrol_complete.signed_body: Your waiver has been signed and your enrolment is now active. See you in class!
enrol_complete.sign_prompt: Please read the waiver carefully and sign below to activate your enrolment.

step1.subtitle: Tell us about yourself
step1.channel: How should we send your verification code?

step2.subtitle: Check your messages
step2.sentTo: We sent a verification code via {{channel}} to {{contact}}.
step2.magicLinkSent: We sent a sign-in link to {{contact}}. Click the link in your email to finish creating your account.

step3.subtitle: Enter verification code
step3.enterCode: Enter the code from your email (you can paste it)

hub.title: Finance dashboard
hub.description: Revenue, expenses, and outstanding payments for your studio.
hub.setup_card_description: View revenue, expenses, and payment activity.
hub.no_active_season: No active learning term — outstanding enrolments are not shown.

disclaimer.management_pl: Management P&L — not a tax return. Your accountant should validate figures.
disclaimer.input_vat: Expense VAT is recorded for bookkeeping; reclaim rules are your accountant's domain.

payments.title: Payments log
payments.date_filter_paid_only: Date filter applies to paid date only — pending payments are excluded.

export.too_many: Too many rows to export (max 5,000). Narrow your filters.

refund_payment.title: Refund payment
refund_payment.grow_note: Grow typically allows a full refund only on the same day as the charge. The provider message is shown below if it rejects the refund.

enrolment.checkout_prepare_failed: Could not prepare enrolment for payment
enrolment.payment_confirm_pending: Payment received. Confirmation may take a moment.
enrolment.mock_payment_hint: Test payment — enter card details and pay to complete enrolment.
enrolment.mock_success_hint: Use 4580458045804580 for a successful test payment.
enrolment.mock_decline_hint: Use 4580000000000000 to simulate a declined card.
enrolment.mock_payment_declined: Your card was declined. Please check the number or try a different card.
enrolment.grow_mock_hint: GROW_MOCK is on, so the hosted page is simulated and the payment auto-confirms.
enrolment.grow_waiting: Waiting for payment confirmation… this can take a few seconds.
enrolment.grow_timeout: We have not received confirmation yet. If you completed payment, please wait a moment and retry.
enrolment.missing_class_or_term: Select a class and term before payment
enrolment.waiver_scroll_prompt: Scroll to the bottom to enable signing
enrolment.waiver_checkbox_label: I have read and accept this waiver
enrolment.waiver_token_expired: Please scroll to the bottom again to re-confirm you have read the waiver.
enrolment.waiver_view_error: Could not confirm reading. Please try scrolling again.
enrolment.waiver_no_template: No active waiver template is set up. Please ask a studio administrator to add a waiver template before enrolling.
enrolment.waiver_guardian_confirm: I confirm I am the parent or legal guardian of {{studentName}} and am authorised to sign this waiver on their behalf.
enrolment.waiver_minor_cannot_sign_title: A parent or guardian must sign
enrolment.waiver_minor_cannot_sign_body: {{studentName}} is under 18. Israeli law requires a parent or legal guardian to sign the waiver. Please ask a parent or guardian to log in and complete the enrolment.

tax.title: Tax & pricing
tax.description: Set VAT rate and whether class prices include VAT. This controls what families see and pay.
tax.vat_rate_help: e.g. 17 for Israel. Use 0 if VAT-exempt.
tax.vat_rate_invalid: Enter a VAT rate between 0 and 100.
tax.prices_include_vat_help: When enabled, the price you enter for each class is the total the customer pays.

stripe.title: Stripe
stripe.description: Each school uses its own Stripe account (Standard). Secrets are encrypted and never shown again after save.

grow.title: Payments & invoices (Grow)
grow.description: Grow captures card payments and issues the tax document together. Enter your Grow (Meshulam) credentials below.
grow.hub_description: Card payments and tax documents in one place

hub.page_description: Update your school profile, branding, and regional defaults.
hub.profile_description: Display name shown across the app.
hub.subdomain_readonly: Subdomain cannot be changed after launch. Contact support if you need a change.
hub.branding_description: Primary and accent colours applied across the site.
hub.locale_description: Default language, country, currency, and phone region.
hub.country_change_warning: Changing country may affect tax and locale behaviour after payments exist.
hub.currency_locked: Currency cannot be changed after payments have been recorded.
hub.currency_locked_hint: Locked because this tenant has payment records.
hub.compliance_description: Manage consent templates and signed waiver evidence.

onboarding.title: Provision new tenant
onboarding.description: Create and configure a tenant for a new industry or school.
onboarding.subdomain_help: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
onboarding.subdomain_taken: This subdomain is already in use.
onboarding.integrations_skip: Integrations can be configured later in school settings.
onboarding.starter_seed: Default expense categories will be created automatically.
onboarding.admin_email_help: After provisioning, invite this user to sign up with the new subdomain.
onboarding.success_message: Tenant {{subdomain}} is ready. Invite the admin to sign up, then assign tenant_admin role.
